overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a foggy, neon-lit Night City. The player traverses elevated walkways, descends stairs through a covered underpass with digital billboards, and emerges into an open plaza with large advertisements and graffiti-covered walls. The atmosphere is dense with orange-hued fog and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated foggy walkway with orange safety barriers, approaching a descending ramp

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the distance, moving away from camera

entered.detail: bright orange construction-style barrier railing along the walkway edge
modern bench with glowing cyan neon light strips underneath
skyscraper barely visible through dense orange fog and haze
tall modern street light illuminating the foggy atmosphere
large rectangular planter box with dark foliage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated pedestrian walkway enveloped in thick orange fog. Orange safety barriers line the path while futuristic neon-lit benches glow on the right. A lone pedestrian walks ahead in the distance as the camera moves forward toward a descending ramp, with skyscrapers barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: descending stairway to lower plaza level

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs with red handrails
transitions from elevated walkway to lower plaza level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs with red railings, following a pedestrian into a lower plaza area

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing walking down the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with textured surface leading downward
bright red metal handrail along the stairway edge
opening leading to covered lower level with visible lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a concrete stairway with bright red handrails, transitioning from the elevated walkway to a lower plaza level. A pedestrian walks ahead down the stairs. The tall foggy buildings shift to the left as the camera moves downward toward a covered entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial underpass with digital advertising

events.description: enters covered underpass with large digital billboards and neon lighting
lighting shifts from mixed natural/artificial to predominantly artificial neon and screen glow

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered pedestrian underpass passing beneath large digital displays and neon-lit arches

entered.detail: large concrete archway with green neon accent lighting along its edge
massive screen displaying advertisement with woman's face and product
archway structure illuminated with green neon light strips
thick structural support column for the overpass above

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a covered commercial underpass where the sky disappears overhead. Large digital billboards display advertisements on the walls, while green neon lights accent the architectural arches. The environment becomes darker and more enclosed, with artificial lighting dominating the visual atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: building exterior corridor with large vertical billboards

events.description: exits covered underpass back into open air along building facade
ascends short stairs and continues along building exterior

agents.ego_description: emerging from the underpass and walking along a modern glass building facade with large digital advertisements

entered.detail: short concrete stairway with red trim leading up from underpass
modern curved building with reflective blue-tinted glass windows
tall building covered with massive vertical digital advertisements showing characters
heavy concrete support structure with red structural beams

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the camera ascends short stairs and moves along the exterior of a modern glass building. Large vertical digital billboards cover the neighboring building facades, displaying advertisements. The environment opens up again to the foggy night sky while maintaining the urban commercial atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with graffiti art and digital signage

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area approaching stairs, passing graffiti-covered walls and large digital displays

entered.detail: wide open pedestrian area with smooth concrete paving
dark wall covered with white skeletal graffiti art and tags
wide staircase leading up to higher level of the plaza

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban plaza with smooth concrete surfaces. A prominent graffiti-covered wall featuring skeletal artwork appears on the left, while large digital billboards continue to illuminate the background. The camera approaches a wide staircase leading upward, with the foggy orange atmosphere persisting throughout the open space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a hazy elevated walkway down through a claustrophobic commercial underpass and back out into a wide, neon-lit urban plaza. It begins by moving forward through thick orange fog along a pedestrian path lined with glowing benches and safety barriers, following a lone figure toward a descending ramp. As the camera moves downward, it descends a concrete stairway with bright red handrails, shifting the perspective from the towering foggy skyscrapers toward a covered entrance. The scene then transitions into a dark, enclosed underpass where the sky vanishes, replaced by green neon architectural arches and large digital billboards. Finally, the camera emerges from the tunnel and ascends short stairs past a modern glass building, opening into a broad concrete plaza featuring a graffiti-covered wall with skeletal artwork under the persisting orange haze.
